approaches.title: Bidirectional character mapping
approaches.summary: Uses fixed-size arrays to maintain a mapping from each character in the first string to the second and a reverse uniqueness check, rejecting inconsistent or non

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using a signed mapping array and a boolean array to enforce a one-to-one character mapping.
Refines the same bidirectional mapping strategy with Option<u8> arrays, get_or_insert, and idiomatic byte iteration.
